name: Heroic Challenger - Assault Halberd
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｈ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ヒロイック</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>・<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｃ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>チャレンジャー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>強</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>襲</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のハルベルト
desc: If your opponent controls a monster and you control no monsters, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). If this card attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage to your opponent. When this card inflicts battle damage to your opponent: You can add 1 "Heroic" card from your Deck to your hand.
mnst_eff: If your opponent controls a monster and you control no monsters, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). If this card attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage to your opponent. When this card inflicts battle damage to your opponent: You can add 1 "Heroic" card from your Deck to your hand.
eff: If your opponent controls a monster and you control no monsters, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). If this card attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage to your opponent. When this card inflicts battle damage to your opponent: You can add 1 "Heroic" card from your Deck to your hand.

action: Activates if battle damage is inflicted
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
